requirements.summary: Create a landing page displaying a welcome message confirming local network status

file_operations.description: Create landing page component that displays a welcome message, network status confirmation, and integrates the generated hero banner background (frontend/public/assets/generated/hero-network.dim_1920x400.png) as a visual element
Wire the Home page component into the router as the default route ('/') and ensure it renders when users access the application

requirements.summary: Implement navigation menu with Dashboard, Network Status, and Settings sections
acceptanceCriteria: Navigation menu is visible on all pages
All three menu items are present and clickable
Navigation provides clear indication of current page

file_operations.description: Create navigation menu component with links to Dashboard, Network Status, and Settings pages, including active state indication and the generated network icon (frontend/public/assets/generated/network-icon.dim_128x128.png) as a logo/brand element
Create layout wrapper component that includes the Navigation component and wraps page content, ensuring consistent navigation across all pages
Wrap all routes with the Layout component to ensure the navigation menu appears on every page

requirements.summary: Create Dashboard page displaying placeholder sections for network information
acceptanceCriteria: Dashboard page is accessible from navigation
Page displays placeholder sections for network info

file_operations.description: Create Dashboard page component with organized placeholder sections for network information display (e.g., connected devices, bandwidth, uptime)
Create Network Status page component as a placeholder to fulfill the navigation menu requirement
Create Settings page component as a placeholder to fulfill the navigation menu requirement
Register routes for Dashboard ('/dashboard'), Network Status ('/network-status'), and Settings ('/settings') pages in the router configuration

requirements.summary: Apply professional visual theme with modern color scheme (avoiding blue and purple) that conveys reliability and local network connectivity
acceptanceCriteria: Consistent color scheme applied across all pages
Design does not use blue or purple as primary colors

file_operations.description: Configure custom color palette using earthy, warm tones (such as greens, oranges, or teals) that avoid blue and purple, while conveying reliability and connectivity themes
Define global typography styles with professional font selections, consistent spacing utilities, and base styles that support the network connectivity visual theme across the application
